name: 16q24_ANKRD11_SD
description: 16q24.3 SDs flanking ANKRD11 — the KBG syndrome gene. Direct-orientation duplicon pair mediates recurrent ~200-700 kb microdeletions encompassing ANKRD11.

architecture.internal_structure: Two flanking SD modules of ~30-50 kb at ~97% identity surrounding ANKRD11; subtelomeric LCR component contributes.
